title: bupleurum barceloi
intro: Bupleurum barceloi, also known as Bupleurum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities, as well as its ability to modulate the immune system. Bupleurum barceloi is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as exhibiting potential neuroprotective effects. It is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs like ginseng and licorice root, to support its therapeutic effects.
